title: The Mole [Reimagined]
description: The terrible creature from underground has returned
body:
### An unofficial reimagining of [The Mole (horror)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-mole-(horror)) by [Danila_Podpivas](https://modrinth.com/user/Danila_Podpivas) for new versions


![The Mole Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/817dfed9d7172b999a02aca28a6ee5d01e7944b4.png)

## A dangerous creature emerges from underground. Its goal is to kill you at any cost, destroying blocks and destroying buildings.

**What has changed:**
- The mod is more optimized (code refactored from MCreator to the regular Forge API)
- The sounds became less loud
- Unnecessary functionality has been removed
- Mob mechanics have been reworked
- Improved AI
- Now the main goal of the mob is **a lot of griefing!**
  
To disable mob griefing, enter the command:
```
/gamerule moleGriefing false
```
_(Default value - true)_

**NOTE**: The mole cannot break obsidian or harder blocks. Water and lava will buy you time.

**GeckoLib 4+ is requred!**
